## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's partnership with RAMP and explore strategies for improving SEO and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [RAMP is fully committed to AEO/LLM optimization as a future growth lever, but faces challenges in execution and traditional SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [GrowthX has been working with RAMP for a year, publishing 100 articles and 100 refreshes, with success in vendor pages and long-tail content](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a "strategy sprint" to create a comprehensive knowledge graph and optimize content for both human readers and AI/LLM systems](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Opportunities exist for expanding editorial content, aggressive content refreshes, and experimenting with new formats like industry newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)

## Topics

### RAMP's Current SEO and LLM Optimization Challenges

  - [4-person SEO team (plus 1 open backfill) with traditional growth strategists](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Brought in a full-stack engineer for LLM work, but they're temporary](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Identified three key areas for improvement:](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
    1.  Winning in LLM visibility (currently doing "hacky stuff," technical optimizations, and content/external citations)
    2.  Optimizing site/funnels for bots and agents, not just humans
    3.  Improving traditional SEO performance against competitors like Brex

### GrowthX's Partnership and Achievements with RAMP

  - [Partnership started in August 2022, now at 1-year mark](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Published 100 articles and 100 refreshes over \~7 months](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Success with vendor pages and custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Created per diems and expense categories content](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Focusing on visibility across various platforms, including AI-powered search engines like Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### GrowthX's Strategy and Approach

  - [Proposed "strategy sprint" to create a universal map/knowledge graph of audience interests](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Focus on deep understanding of personas, including fears and uncertainties](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Create content that mentions the brand naturally and adapts messaging for long-tail queries](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Utilize a combination of AI-powered workflows and human review for content creation and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

### Content Creation and Optimization Techniques

  - [Demonstrated success with Augment Code use case:](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [Created detailed, interactive content based on actual usage data](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [Achieved high click-through rates and time on page metrics](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [Content being cited in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Emphasis on personalizing content for specific use cases and industries](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Importance of refreshing content regularly (ideally every 3 months) for improved visibility](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

### Potential New Initiatives for RAMP

  - [Creating an industry-focused newsletter similar to CFO Club](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Utilizing platforms like Beehiiv to acquire newsletter subscribers cost-effectively ($1-2 per subscriber)](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Exploring opportunities for net new editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Considering a separate content section (e.g., "/guides") for experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to discuss the proposed initiatives with Luke and Lindsay (comms team lead)](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [GrowthX to regroup internally and send detailed proposals](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting with the broader team for a deep dive into new ideas](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of conducting a "strategy sprint" with GrowthX (8-week, $30k engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Consider ways to integrate GrowthX's approach with RAMP's existing editorial content team](https://fathom.video/share/eKhEjkn7PGX5A2UxmEgYKopyAsocayVe?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
